center.name: 哥倫比亞中部山脈
center.summary: 哥倫比亞中部山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括黄耳鹦哥、Choco manakin、Barred fruiteater等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia-Venezuela border, in the Andes of Venezuela from Lara west into Colombia's eastern Andes, from Colombia's central and western Andes south through the Andes of Ecuador into far northern Peru's Piura Department, and on the eastern slope of the Andes of Peru from Amazonas south to Pasco Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Colombia's Central and Eastern Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |title=Three bird species new to Venezuela and notes on the behaviour and distribution of other poorly known species |journal=Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club |date=1999 |volume=119 |page=233 |url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/part/76778 |access-date=15 May 2024}} In Colombia it is found in the Central and Eastern Ranges of the Andes, as well in the Sierra de Perijá Range and in an isolated population near the town of Frontino. In Ecuador, it is found in the central part of the country in the La Sierra region from the Colombian border in the north to the Peruvian border in the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the brown-banded antpitta is found in the Central Andes of Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pusillus, both slopes of Colombia's Western and Central Andes south through both slopes of Ecuador's Andes and into Peru's Andes on the east slope to the Department of San Martín The brown-billed scythebill inhabits humid evergreen forest, mostly in highlands but locally in lowlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Colombia's Central Andes from Antioquia Department to Huila Department and the Western Andes in Cauca and Valle del Cauca departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | title =The Birds of Ecuador: Field Guide | publisher =Cornell University Press | volume = II| date =2001 | location =Ithaca | pages =560 | isbn =978-0-8014-8721-7 }} It might also be found in the northern part of Colombia's Central Andes though that population might be of subspecies C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crescent-face antpitta is found in scattered locations in Colombia's Central Andes from Quindío Department south on the eastern Andean slope to Loja Province in southern Ecuador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern population is found in Colombia's Central Andes east of the Cauca River and has a small subpopulation further east past the Magdalena River Valley in the Iguaque Massif

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: "The range of Hooded Antpitta is patchy and poorly known, with large gaps between known populations, though new localities still being discovered." The nominate subspecies is found in Colombia, in the Western Andes of Valle del Cauca and Cauca departments, on the west slope of the Central Andes in Valle del Cauca and Antioquia departments, and on the west slope of the Eastern Andes at the head of the Magdalena River Valley in Huila Department and possibly further north as well

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Colombia's Central and Western Andes, on the western slope of the Andes in northwestern Ecuador south to Pichincha Province, on the eastern slope through length of Ecuador slightly into northern Peru, and on the eastern slope in Peru from southern Amazonas Department south to Ayacucho Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the northern and central parts of Colombia's Western Andes and on the western slope of the Central Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: columbianus is found in Colombia's Central Andes between Caldas and Cauca departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia-Venezuela border, in the Andes from northeastern Trujillo in Venezuela into the northern part of Colombia's Eastern Andes, and nearly continuously in the Andes from Colombia's Central and Western ranges south through Ecuador and Peru into Bolivia as far as Santa Cruz Department.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: griseigularis is found in extreme eastern Panama, the Western Andes of Colombia as far south as Nariño Department, the west slope of Colombia's Central Andes as far south as Quindío Department, and the Serranía de San Lucas in northern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However, it can be found at elevations of up to in the Chocó of the Cordillera Central in Colombia. It inhabits stunted secondary growth on foothills, especially around dense, mossy woodland around ridge tops, steep canyon slopes, or landslide scars

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The star-chested treerunner is found in Colombia's Western and Central Andes from Chocó and Antioquia departments and south into western Ecuador as far as Pichincha Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: columbianus is the more northerly of the two, found in Tolima Department in Colombia's Central Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in the Colombian Central Andes and on the west slope of the country's Western Andes south along the Andean west slope to central Ecuador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Colombia's Central Andes, in the central Andean valley of Ecuador between Imbambura and Chimborazo provinces, locally in Peru's central Andes, and from Peru's southern Andes south through central Bolivia, western Paraguay, and southern Brazil into northwestern Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Colombia on both slopes of the Central Andes in Antioquia Department and on both slopes of the Eastern Andes between Santander and Cundinamarca departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the far northern end of Colombia's Western Andes, on both slopes of the Central Andes in Antioquia Department, and on the eastern slope of the Eastern Andes from Boyacá Department south. Its range continues south on the eastern Andean slope through Ecuador and intermittently in Peru to Puno Department.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes of the western Venezuelan states of Mérida (state) and Táchira, in Colombia's Central and Eastern Andes, and in Ecuador 's Andes south to Cotopaxi Province on the west side and to northeastern Loja Province in the east

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-eared parrot nests and lives among wax palms in a few areas of Western and Central cordilleras of Colombia, which are northern sub-ranges of the Andes, where it inhabits cloud forests about 1800–3000 meters above sea level

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: quindiuna: primarily in Colombia's Central Andes from Antioquia Department south slightly into northern Ecuador; also in Colombia at northern end of the Western Andes and the Eastern Andes north to Huila Department The black-collared jay inhabits the interior and edges of cloudforest, elfin forest, and mature secondary forest, especially in areas with much bamboo and tree ferns. In elevation it ranges between in Venezuela and Colombia and between in Ecuador.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M
